7-loewe.name: 7 Loewe
7-loewe.description: A mysterious, incense-heavy woody fragrance lifted by a crisp, tart apple note.

accord-oud.name: Accord Oud
accord-oud.description: A leathery, mineral oud with saffron and rose — darker and more austere than Oud Immortel, with less sweetness.

aganice.name: Aganice
aganice.description: A cool, luminous aldehyde rose named for an ancient astrologer — bright and airy, grounded in clean cedar.

agua-de-loewe.name: Agua de Loewe
agua-de-loewe.description: A refreshing, transparent, and unisex citrus-tea fragrance, perfect for hot weather.

aguamadera.name: Aguamadera
aguamadera.description: A transparent citrus-wood scent with smooth guaiac and cedar warmth.

aldehyde-44.name: Aldehyde 44
aldehyde-44.description: A classic aldehyde floral in the Chanel No. 5 tradition — crisp, soapy, and glamorous, but with Le Labo's raw naturalistic edge.

alerce.name: Alerce
alerce.description: Named after the ancient Patagonian larch — dense, resinous wood with cool juniper and earthy vetiver. Timeless and unhurried.

allure-homme-sport.name: Allure Homme Sport
allure-homme-sport.description: An energetic and luminous citrus marine scent over a creamy, musky base.

ambre-29.name: Ambre 29
ambre-29.description: A forested amber — resinous and warm with a green fir-balsam quality that keeps it from being stuffy.

ambre-nuit.name: Ambre Nuit
ambre-nuit.description: A dark, sensual encounter between the animalistic warmth of amber and the delicate elegance of Turkish rose.

ambrette-9.name: Ambrette 9
ambrette-9.description: A skin-close musky-woody built on ambrette seed — soft, slightly nutty, and intimate, a gentler take on Another 13's skin-scent aesthetic.

another-13.name: Another 13
another-13.description: A clean, musky skin scent with subtle fruit and soft amber, minimal and addictive.

aura-floral.name: Aura Floral
aura-floral.description: A radiant, luminous floral bouquet with a subtle, contrasting leather base.

azahar.name: Azahar
azahar.description: A classic white floral centred on orange blossom and neroli — sun-drenched, open, and Mediterranean.

baie-rose-26.name: Baie Rose 26
baie-rose-26.description: A fizzy pink pepper and rose over light woods — easy, modern, and slightly fruity in the way pink pepper reads as quasi-berry.

bal-dafrique.name: Bal d'Afrique
bal-dafrique.description: A sunlit, slightly sweet floral with sparkling citrus and soft vetiver, great for warm days and joyful casual wear.

ballena-de-la-pampa.name: Ballena de la Pampa
ballena-de-la-pampa.description: A salty, musky ambergris scent inspired by whales drifting along the Patagonian coast.

bergamote-22.name: Bergamote 22
bergamote-22.description: Bright bergamot and grapefruit balanced with soft woods and musk, sparkling yet refined.

bibliotheque.name: Bibliothèque
bibliotheque.description: Old books, leather, and dry woods with a ripened-fruit warmth — evokes a well-worn library on a winter afternoon.

big-sur-after-rain.name: Big Sur After Rain
big-sur-after-rain.description: The California coastline after rainfall — eucalyptus and sage over wet stone and cedar. Meditative and singular.

blanche.name: Blanche
blanche.description: A clean, laundry-fresh floral with soft rose and creamy sandalwood, ideal for office days and low-key settings.

bleu-de-chanel.name: Bleu de Chanel
bleu-de-chanel.description: A crisp, clean, and universally appealing woody aromatic with bright citrus and a smoky incense drydown.

bois-d-argent.name: Bois d'Argent
bois-d-argent.description: An ethereal, mysterious iris and myrrh scent that weaves a soft, smoky, and powdery spell.

bowmakers.name: Bowmakers
bowmakers.description: Resinous woods evoking violin workshops and polished instruments.

buenos-aires.name: Buenos Aires
buenos-aires.description: A sun-warmed Argentine citrus that blooms into soft florals before fading into clean skin musk — elegant and urbane.

burning-barbershop.name: Burning Barbershop
burning-barbershop.description: A smoky barbershop scent blending mint, lavender, and caramelized vanilla.

byredo-1984.description: A dark, smoky leathered iris with tobacco and pepper — named for Orwell, confrontational and politically charged.

byredo-infrared.name: Infrared
byredo-infrared.description: A sharp, acidic tomato-leaf opening that dries into a smooth vetiver-woody base — polarizing, modern, and deliberately odd.

byredo-unnamed.name: Unnamed
byredo-unnamed.description: A deliberate study in ambiguity — powdery iris and violet with clean woods, stripped of any identifying flourish.

casablanca-lily.name: Casablanca Lily
casablanca-lily.description: A cool, luminous white lily — expansive and watery, neither sweet nor heavy, centred on the lily's clean petals.

cedre-11.name: Cèdre 11
cedre-11.description: A spare, austere cedar with cold metallic aldehydes — minimalist and architectural, Scandinavian in its restraint.

chance-eau-tendre.name: Chance Eau Tendre
chance-eau-tendre.description: A delicate, fruity-floral interpretation of Chance. Soft, romantic, and endlessly wearable.

chanel-no-5.name: No. 5
chanel-no-5.description: The quintessential floral-aldehyde perfume. Timeless, powdery, and abstractly feminine.

chergui.name: Chergui
chergui.description: A hot Moroccan desert wind captured in a bottle. Sweet honey, dry hay, and rich tobacco swirl over warm amber and incense.
chergui.story: "A fire fanned by the wind, a desert in flames. Like the sap rising, Chergui sucks up the moisture and creates a fragrant whirlwind." – Serge Lutens

coco-mademoiselle.name: Coco Mademoiselle
coco-mademoiselle.description: A modern, vibrant oriental floral with a striking contrast of fresh citrus and sensual patchouli.

comme-des-garcons-2.name: Comme des Garçons 2
comme-des-garcons-2.description: A play of light and shadow inspired by Japanese calligraphy ink. Metallic aldehydes contrast with warm, earthy incense and patchouli.
comme-des-garcons-2.story: "A fragrance inspired by the Japanese art of calligraphy. The light and shadow, the reflection and opacity."

copala.name: Copála
copala.description: Sacred copal resin smoke with glowing amber warmth, reminiscent of ceremonial incense.

coromandel.name: Coromandel
coromandel.description: A rich, baroque oriental built around an exquisite, smooth patchouli and white chocolate.

costera.name: Costera
costera.description: A coastal breeze of salt and citrus over driftwood and ambergris — open, breezy, and oceanic.

cruz-del-sur.name: Cruz del Sur
cruz-del-sur.description: Named for the Southern Cross — a cool stellar woody with iris and dry vetiver, elegant and precisely balanced.

cuyen.name: Cuyen
cuyen.description: Cuyen means 'moon' in Mapuche — a luminous, skin-close floral that glows softly in low light.

cythera.name: Cythera
cythera.description: Lush and sensual — a full white-floral bouquet warmed by sandalwood and benzoin, island-goddess energy.

darwin.name: Darwin
darwin.description: Bright grapefruit and airy jasmine drift into a crisp vetiver base, reminiscent of botanical exploration.

debaser.name: Debaser
debaser.description: Milky fig and green leaves with creamy coconut warmth.

dior-homme-intense.name: Dior Homme Intense
dior-homme-intense.description: A sophisticated, woody, and intensely powdery iris fragrance. Elegant, masculine, and refined.

diptyque-34.name: Diptyque 34
diptyque-34.description: A woody-floral homage to Diptyque's Saint-Germain address — books, dried flowers, leather, and warm wood in a Parisian apartment.

do-son.name: Do Son
do-son.description: Airy tuberose with orange blossom and soft musk inspired by seaside gardens.

ds-sundazed.name: Sundazed
ds-sundazed.description: A bright, hazy citrus with a coconut-water softness — feels like lying in the sun with your eyes closed.

eau-capitale.name: Eau Capitale
eau-capitale.description: A city rose — bold currant and rich patchouli give classic rose a modern, urban edge without sweetness.

eau-capitale-diptyque.name: Eau Capitale
eau-capitale-diptyque.description: A fresh, fruity Parisian rose with a patchouli-musk base — modern, chic, and feminine without being sweet.

eau-de-campagne.name: Eau de Campagne
eau-de-campagne.description: A raw, vegetal green — tomato leaf and basil on sun-warmed skin — nostalgic and hyper-naturalistic.

eau-de-lierre.name: Eau de Lierre
eau-de-lierre.description: Crushed ivy leaf and cool violet — fresh, slightly sappy, and garden-damp. Unobtrusive and easy to wear.

eau-de-minthe.name: Eau de Minthé
eau-de-minthe.description: A crisp aromatic mint-and-basil refresher — bracing and herbal rather than sweet, built for sharp clarity.

eau-des-sens.name: Eau des Sens
eau-des-sens.description: Sparkling orange and juniper with an earthy patchouli undercurrent that adds depth without heaviness.

eau-duelle.name: Eau Duelle
eau-duelle.description: Spicy vanilla wrapped in incense and amber warmth.

eau-moheli.name: Eau Mohéli
eau-moheli.description: A transparent, airy ylang-ylang from the island of Moheli — stripped of tropical weight, rendered clean and dreamlike.

eau-rose.name: Eau Rose
eau-rose.description: A clean, dewy rose brightened with citrus and soft lychee — transparent, modern, and universally easy to wear.

eau-sauvage.name: Eau Sauvage
eau-sauvage.description: The epitome of French elegance. A timeless, crisp, and refined citrus chypre.

eidesis.name: Eidesis
eidesis.description: A calm, grounding blend of geranium, cypress, and vetiver — quietly confident and easy across all occasions.

eleventh-hour.name: Eleventh Hour
eleventh-hour.description: Warm, boozy amber with dried-fruit sweetness and soft woods, ideal for cold evenings and close-to-skin occasions.

encens-13.name: Encens 13
encens-13.description: A church-incense and resin scent — smoky frankincense over myrrh and labdanum, deeply meditative and sacral.

encre-noire.name: Encre Noire
encre-noire.description: A dark, brooding, and uncompromising take on vetiver. Damp earth, dark woods, and green cypress evoke a mysterious midnight forest.

endeavour.name: Endeavour
endeavour.description: A crisp botanical green — pink pepper and lemon spark over Japanese hinoki and cool mint, grounded by warm palisander. Named for the spirit of exploration.

eolo.name: Eolo
eolo.description: Named for the god of wind — a spare, transparent green-citrus evoking Patagonian open air with nothing superfluous.

eremia.name: Eremia
eremia.description: Soft green tea and citrus over musky woods, evoking quiet urban nature.

esencia.name: Esencia
esencia.description: A complex, fiercely aromatic fougère. Herbal, woody, and intensely masculine.

fahrenheit.name: Fahrenheit
fahrenheit.description: A unique, polarizing, and legendary fragrance with a signature violet leaf and leather accord that evokes burning wood and gasoline.

fleur-de-peau.name: Fleur de Peau
fleur-de-peau.description: A second-skin iris-musk evoking warm, clean skin — soft, powdery, and deeply intimate without heaviness.

fleur-doranger-27.name: Fleur d'Oranger 27
fleur-doranger-27.description: Billowing orange blossom with jasmine and tuberose — warm, heady, and slightly narcotic. A solar floral for evenings.

florabellio.name: Florabellio
florabellio.description: A crisp apple-and-flowers opening that softens into driftwood musk — aquatic, airy, and easy on a summer day.

gabrielle.name: Gabrielle
gabrielle.description: A radiant, solar white floral bouquet that feels abstract, modern, and luminous.

gaiac-10.name: Gaiac 10
gaiac-10.description: A dry, smoky guaiac wood with soft citrus — clean-burning and uncluttered, almost meditative in its simplicity.

geranium-30.name: Géranium 30
geranium-30.description: A rosy, slightly minty geranium with lavender and warm wood — clean and professional without being anonymous.

geranium-pour-monsieur.name: Geranium pour Monsieur
geranium-pour-monsieur.description: A sharp, aromatic geranium brightened with mint and sage — dry and classically structured, effortlessly masculine.

gloam.name: Gloam
gloam.description: A dusky floral with powdery iris and warm cocoa undertones.

gris-dior.name: Gris Dior
gris-dior.description: A modern, sophisticated chypre that perfectly translates the iconic Dior gray into a seamless blend of rose and patchouli.

gypsy-water.name: Gypsy Water
gypsy-water.description: A smoky, earthy unisex scent with bright citrus opening into a pine-campfire warmth, great for relaxed everyday wear.

huemul.name: Huemul
huemul.description: Named for the endangered Andean deer — damp forest pine, juniper, and moss, smelling of cold mountain air.

hwyl.name: Hwyl
hwyl.description: A smoky forest scent inspired by Japanese hinoki woods and temple incense.

hypnotic-poison.name: Hypnotic Poison
hypnotic-poison.description: An intoxicating, magnetic, and deeply sensual oriental vanilla with a bitter almond bite.

i-dont-know-what.name: I Don't Know What
i-dont-know-what.description: A transparent woody enhancer built around Iso E Super — it amplifies other fragrances and skin chemistry rather than standing alone.

iguazu.name: Iguazú
iguazu.description: The mist and spray of the Iguazú falls — an aquatic-green floral, vast, humid, and alive with movement.

ilio.name: Ilio
ilio.description: A sun-drenched solar floral anchored by heliotrope — warm, slightly powdery, and Mediterranean in spirit.

iris-39.name: Iris 39
iris-39.description: A cool, chalky iris over violet leaf — earthy, rooty, and powdery in the classical French iris tradition.

jadore.name: J'adore
jadore.description: An opulent, luminous, and finely crafted bouquet of the world's most beautiful flowers.

jasmin-17.name: Jasmin 17
jasmin-17.description: A dewy, natural jasmine — green and watery rather than rich and indolic, evoking jasmine picked in the early morning.

karst.name: Karst
karst.description: Mineral, herbaceous freshness with crisp juniper and dry woods.

katanka.name: Katanka
katanka.description: A leathered rose with warm spice and oud — one of the more declarative, formal entries in the Fueguia line.

kyoto.name: Kyoto
kyoto.description: A meditative cedar-and-incense evoking a Japanese temple — clean, contemplative, and spare.

la-cautiva.name: La Cautiva
la-cautiva.description: A lush tuberose balanced by dark currant and soft sandalwood, rich but airy.

la-tulipe.name: La Tulipe
la-tulipe.description: A precise, dewy floral centred on tulip — clean and quietly feminine, worn without occasion.

labdanum-18.name: Labdanum 18
labdanum-18.description: A dense, resinous amber built on labdanum — dark, animalic, and rich. Intense projection that opens into warm sandalwood.

le-lion.name: Le Lion de Chanel
le-lion.description: A bold, majestic amber fragrance dominated by a leathery labdanum and sensual vanilla.

lil-fleur.name: Lil Fleur
lil-fleur.description: A soft, slightly powdery amber with warm cashmere and citrus — gentle, comforting, and barely there.

loewe-001-man.name: 001 Man
loewe-001-man.description: A clean, modern, and sensual woody musk fragrance with a subtle, powdery violet finish.

loewe-001-woman.name: 001 Woman
loewe-001-woman.description: A bright, sparkling floral with a unique, cozy linen accord and a creamy vanilla base.

loewe-earth.name: Loewe Earth
loewe-earth.description: A surprising and earthy chypre featuring a unique truffle note over a bed of violet and vetiver.

lombre-dans-leau.name: L'Ombre Dans L'Eau
lombre-dans-leau.description: Green currant leaves and romantic rose with earthy moss.

luciernaga.name: Luciérnaga
luciernaga.description: Named for the firefly — a luminous, warm white floral with a peachy softness that glows gently on skin.

lys-41.name: Lys 41
lys-41.description: A lush white floral bouquet with creamy vanilla warmth.

malbec.name: Malbec
malbec.description: Inspired by Argentine wine — dark berry and leather over dry tobacco and wood, simultaneously elegant and rustic.

marrakech-intense.name: Marrakech Intense
marrakech-intense.description: Warm spices and florals over sandalwood and patchouli, inspired by Moroccan markets.

miraceti.name: Miraceti
miraceti.description: A deep resinous amber inspired by maritime trade and spice routes.

miss-dior.name: Miss Dior
miss-dior.description: A sweet, velvety, and colourful floral fragrance that celebrates love and happiness.

mississippi-medicine.name: Mississippi Medicine
mississippi-medicine.description: Swampy medicinal herbs over tobacco and earthy moss — the American South distilled into a bottle. Unusual and unmistakable.

mixed-emotions.name: Mixed Emotions
mixed-emotions.description: Dry, inky tea and woods with a subtle fruitiness, wearing like a contemplative, quiet veil perfect for workdays.

mojave-ghost.name: Mojave Ghost
mojave-ghost.description: A desert-air blend of magnolia, musk, and sandalwood — ghostly, clean, and quietly intimate. One of the most universally wearable modern scents.

montecristo.name: Montecisto
montecristo.description: Green fig leaves and herbs over soft moss, evoking tropical gardens.

mousse-de-chene-30.name: Mousse de Chêne 30
mousse-de-chene-30.description: A raw oakmoss chypre — earthy, damp, and deeply green, one of the few contemporary fragrances that fully commits to real chypre territory.

musc-25.name: Musc 25
musc-25.description: A clean, powdery white musk with cardamom and soft cedar — refined rather than detergent-flat, worn close to the skin.

neroli-36.name: Néroli 36
neroli-36.description: A clean, sparkling neroli-and-white-tea — crisp and coastal without sunscreen associations, genuinely elegant.

numero-uno.name: Número Uno
numero-uno.description: A clean, sparkling Mexican citrus anchored in vetiver and sandalwood — effortless to wear in any warm setting.

numia.name: Numia
numia.description: Earthy and mineral — violet leaf and pepper over dark labdanum and benzoin, evoking dry soil and ancient stone.

nv-fleur-fantome.name: Night Veils: Fleur Fantome
nv-fleur-fantome.description: A dense floral-amber with oud that blooms in darkness — heavy, ceremonial, and built for the night.

nv-oud-sans-soucis.name: Night Veils: Oud Sans Soucis
nv-oud-sans-soucis.description: Stripped-down oud without ornamentation — raw, leathery, and austere, for those who want nothing else.

nv-prismatic-dream.name: Night Veils: Prismatic Dream
nv-prismatic-dream.description: A silvery, ethereal floral-amber with powdery iris and rose — dreamlike and diffuse, like light through crystal.

nv-tobacco-mandarin.name: Night Veils: Tobacco Mandarin
nv-tobacco-mandarin.description: Sweet mandarin softens tobacco flower over a warm oud base — the most approachable of the Night Veils collection.

olene.name: Olene
olene.description: A bright, transparent white floral bouquet — springlike and airy, cheerful without being heavy.

olous.name: Olous
olous.description: A bright neroli and iris softened with jasmine and sandalwood — Mediterranean-clean, quietly elegant.

open-sky.name: Open Sky
open-sky.description: A transparent, airy green-woody scent evoking open air and altitude — minimal, contemplative, and clean.

ore-xinu.name: Ore
ore-xinu.description: A blend of pre-Columbian resins — elemi, copal, and frankincense — slow-burning and ceremonial.

oronardo.name: OroNardo
oronardo.description: Radiant tuberose wrapped in creamy sandalwood and citrus blossom, rich yet elegant.

orpheon.name: Orphéon
orpheon.description: A cool, smoky iris-and-juniper over dry woods — unisex and architectural, inspired by a Parisian bar.

oud-27.name: Oud 27
oud-27.description: Le Labo's approachable oud — rose and geranium temper its resinous darkness, smoky and rich but never medicinal.

oud-immortel.name: Oud Immortel
oud-immortel.description: Spiced rose and tobacco build over a dense oud and amber base — a full, ceremonial scent for cold evenings or formal occasions.

ouranos.name: Ouranos
ouranos.description: Airy and celestial, with powdery iris and violet lifted on clean aldehydes — named for the sky, weightless and pale.

oyedo.name: Oyedo
oyedo.description: A sharply bright Japanese citrus — yuzu, mandarin, and thyme — with almost no transition. Fast-drying, vivid, and outdoorsy.

palo-santo.name: Palo Santo
palo-santo.description: Sacred Palo Santo smoke grounded in frankincense and warm amber — meditative, earthy, and deeply resinous.

pampeana.name: Pampeana
pampeana.description: Dry pampas grass, hay, and tobacco — a chypre-leaning earthy scent evoking the Argentine grasslands at dusk.

panal.name: Panal
panal.description: A golden honeyed amber centred on beeswax — warm and sweet without being gourmand, deeply comforting.

patagonia-fueguia.name: Patagonia
patagonia-fueguia.description: The open air of the Patagonian steppe — bright citrus, wild herbs, and dry grassy vetiver. Clean, spare, and expansive.

patchouli-24.name: Patchouli 24
patchouli-24.description: Smoky birch tar and thick patchouli over resinous amber — abrasive, masculine, and polarising. Unmistakable.

paulas-ibiza.name: Paula's Ibiza
paulas-ibiza.description: A bohemian, sun-drenched summer fragrance capturing the essence of the Balearic Islands with coconut and driftwood.

philosykos.name: Philosykos
philosykos.description: Green fig leaves and creamy fig milk over dry woods, fresh and Mediterranean.

platinum-egoiste.name: Platinum Égoïste
platinum-egoiste.description: A sharp, metallic, and incredibly crisp fougère that exudes confidence and cleanliness.

poivre-23.name: Poivre 23
poivre-23.description: A dry, assertive pepper-and-cardamom over clean woods — angular and confident, for those who like fragrance with edges.

ptolemy.name: Ptolemy
ptolemy.description: A classical chypre with fresh berry and rose over mossy, earthy dry-down — structured and quietly distinctive.

pulp.name: Pulp
pulp.description: Tropical fruit pulp — fig, blood orange, and currant — soured by green notes and grounded in patchouli. Strange, addictive, and difficult to place.

radio-bombay.name: Radio Bombay
radio-bombay.description: Spiced sandalwood and cardamom drifting through jasmine smoke — a cinematic, Bollywood-radio scent that lodges itself in memory.

reine-de-nuit.name: Reine de Nuit
reine-de-nuit.description: A nocturnal white floral — jasmine and tuberose intensified under darkness, sensual and enveloping.

rep-across-sands.name: Across Sands
rep-across-sands.description: A dry, smoky amber evoking a desert under a vast open sky — incense and myrrh over warm sandalwood.

rep-at-the-barbers.name: At the Barber's
rep-at-the-barbers.description: The nostalgic smell of a classic barbershop — warm leather strop, lavender, and talc-dusted iris.

rep-autumn-vibes.name: Autumn Vibes
rep-autumn-vibes.description: A cozy, spiced autumnal warmth of mulled spices — cinnamon, cardamom, and vanilla over resinous amber.

rep-beach-walk.name: Beach Walk
rep-beach-walk.description: Sunscreen on warm skin, a gentle ocean breeze, and the feel of sand between your toes — a perfect beach day in a bottle.

rep-by-the-fireplace.name: By the Fireplace
rep-by-the-fireplace.description: Crackling wood fire, roasted chestnuts, and vanilla smoke drifting through a winter room.

rep-car-leather-1957.name: Car Leather 1957
rep-car-leather-1957.description: The distinct smell of pristine leather upholstery in a classic automobile — cool, clean, and deliberately evocative.

rep-coffee-break.name: Coffee Break
rep-coffee-break.description: A mid-morning espresso pause — rich roasted coffee with a clean skin finish that's comforting rather than sweet.

rep-flower-market.name: Flower Market
rep-flower-market.description: A fresh, dewy armful of spring flowers — light, natural, and cheerfully alive without being sweet.

rep-from-the-garden.name: From the Garden
rep-from-the-garden.description: The raw, authentic smell of a working garden — sappy tomato leaf and cut greenery over a fresh rose heart.

rep-jazz-club.name: Jazz Club
rep-jazz-club.description: Dim lighting, leather booths, and late-night cigarette smoke at a jazz club — rum, tobacco, and vanilla.

rep-lazy-sunday-morning.name: Lazy Sunday Morning
rep-lazy-sunday-morning.description: The scent of clean white linen on a slow, sunlit morning — powdery, soft, and deeply comforting.

rep-lipstick-on.name: Lipstick On
rep-lipstick-on.description: A vintage powdery lipstick worn on warm skin — retro, softly feminine, and deeply nostalgic.

rep-matcha-meditation.name: Matcha Meditation
rep-matcha-meditation.description: A serene, zen-like green tea and matcha — clean, herbal, and quietly grounding for focused mornings.

rep-on-a-date.name: On a Date
rep-on-a-date.description: A warm, sweetly romantic scent — the anticipation of a first date, with raspberry, rose, and caramel warmth.

rep-on-the-beach.name: On the Beach
rep-on-the-beach.description: A lighter, more watery take on the beach — translucent coconut water and sea salt over a clean ambergris base.

rep-sailing-day.name: Sailing Day
rep-sailing-day.description: The crisp, salty exhilaration of an open-water sail — citrus and sea spray over dry vetiver and driftwood.

rep-spring-summer-bottle.name: Spring/Summer in a Bottle
rep-spring-summer-bottle.description: A literal bottled season — breezy, sunny, and effortlessly cheerful, wearing like the first warm day of the year.

rep-summer-on-the-terrace.name: Summer on the Terrace
rep-summer-on-the-terrace.description: Warm evenings on a Mediterranean terrace — bright citrus and honeysuckle with a soft peach warmth at dusk.

rep-under-the-lemon-trees.name: Under the Lemon Trees
rep-under-the-lemon-trees.description: A sun-warmed afternoon under Italian lemon trees — bright citrus, neroli, and a whisper of peach.

rep-when-the-rain-breaks.name: When the Rain Breaks
rep-when-the-rain-breaks.description: The precise earthy-mineral smell of the first rain hitting dry pavement — petrichor, green tea, and clean wood.

rep-whispers-in-the-library.name: Whispers in the Library
rep-whispers-in-the-library.description: The dusty, contemplative smell of old paper and aged books in a quiet reading room — iris, white wood, and soft amber.

rose-31.name: Rose 31
rose-31.description: A spicy rose with cumin and woods that transforms the floral into something smoky and unisex.

rose-noir.name: Rose Noir
rose-noir.description: A smoky, incense-draped rose with dry guaiac wood — less romantic than sinister, worn as a statement not a gesture.

roses-barres.name: Roses Barres
roses-barres.description: A deconstructed, thorny rose stripped of sweetness — peppery and green, smelling of the stem rather than the bloom.

rozu.name: Rōzu
rozu.description: A woody rose accented by shiso and spices, elegant and architectural.

salares.name: Salares
salares.description: Inspired by Argentina's salt flats — dry, mineral iris over warm amber, arid and otherworldly.

santal-26.name: Santal 26
santal-26.description: A creamy, caramelised sandalwood that reads closer to amber-vanilla in dry-down — smooth and more crowd-pleasing than Santal 33.

santal-33.name: Santal 33
santal-33.description: A smoky sandalwood and leather scent softened by iris and violet, iconic and instantly recognizable.

sauvage.name: Sauvage
sauvage.description: A radically fresh and incredibly powerful scent with spicy bergamot and a potent ambery wood trail.

selknam.name: Selknam
selknam.description: Named for the indigenous people of Tierra del Fuego — primal smoke, resin, and earth, raw and atmospheric.

seven-veils.name: Seven Veils
seven-veils.description: A thick, ceremonial amber with heavy patchouli and labdanum layered over rose and spice — dense, rich, and declarative.

slow-dance.name: Slow Dance
slow-dance.description: A soft floral haze of violet, jasmine, and tart currant — intimate and unhurried, like a slow evening at home.

solo-loewe.name: Solo Loewe
solo-loewe.description: A unique harmony of contrasting elements: wet stones and dry woods, citrus and spices.

solo-loewe-cedro.name: Solo Loewe Cedro
solo-loewe-cedro.description: A stripped-back, elegant woody fragrance emphasizing smooth, high-quality cedar.

spicebomb.name: Spicebomb
spicebomb.description: An explosive cocktail of warm spices, cinnamon, and sweet tobacco. Extroverted, fiery, and deeply comforting.

sunday-cologne.name: Sunday Cologne
sunday-cologne.description: Bright, clean citrus opening with a hint of floral and a soft musky base, perfect for warm-weather casual wear.

sundazed.name: Sundazed
sundazed.description: A warm, tropical-adjacent amber with neroli and coconut — lazy, sun-soaked, and utterly unhurried.

super-cedar.name: Super Cedar
super-cedar.description: A crisp, aromatic cedar sharpened by juniper and green apple — clean and functional, disappears into the skin.

sycomore.name: Sycomore
sycomore.description: A masterclass in vetiver. Smoky, earthy, and refined, evoking autumn woods.

tabac-28.name: Tabac 28
tabac-28.description: A grassy, hay-like tobacco sweetened with iris and dry sandalwood — more aromatic meadow than smoking lounge.

tacit.name: Tacit
tacit.description: A crisp citrus-herbal scent with basil and yuzu over clean woods.

tam-dao.name: Tam Dao
tam-dao.description: Creamy sandalwood and cypress recalling sacred forests in Vietnam.

tempo.name: Tempo
tempo.description: A modern, textured patchouli softened by violet and rose — earthy and dark without the retro connotations.

terre-dhermes.name: Terre d'Hermès
terre-dhermes.description: An elemental masterpiece of bitter orange, sharp flint, and earthy vetiver. Confident, grounded, and endlessly versatile.
terre-dhermes.story: "Feeling the earth, lying on the ground, gazing at the sky." – Jean-Claude Ellena

tf-amber-absolute.name: Amber Absolute
tf-amber-absolute.description: A voluminous incense-laden amber with saffron and myrrh — near-religious in its richness and gravity.

tf-beau-de-jour.name: Beau de Jour
tf-beau-de-jour.description: A crisp, elegant fougère rooted in lavender and oakmoss — the quintessential clean barbershop-meets-outdoors masculine.

tf-black-orchid.name: Black Orchid
tf-black-orchid.description: A dark, Gothic floral chypre — truffle, black orchid, and patchouli collide in Tom Ford's most theatrical signature.

tf-coffee-rose.name: Coffee Rose
tf-coffee-rose.description: Dark roasted coffee amplifies a rich rose over warm oud and vanilla — a deeply aromatic evening fragrance.

tf-costa-azzurra.name: Costa Azzurra
tf-costa-azzurra.description: A Mediterranean coastal woody — resinous mastic and oakmoss over dry cypress and sandalwood, salty and sun-warmed.

tf-fucking-fabulous.name: Fucking Fabulous
tf-fucking-fabulous.description: A provocative leather-almond pairing that straddles masculine and feminine — confident, sweet, and entirely itself.

tf-grey-vetiver.name: Grey Vetiver
tf-grey-vetiver.description: A clean, tailored grey vetiver with sage and grapefruit — quietly authoritative, boardroom-ready without effort.

tf-italian-cypress.name: Italian Cypress
tf-italian-cypress.description: A sharp, vertical green wood built around Mediterranean cypress — elemental, sun-bleached, and architectural.

tf-lavender-extreme.name: Lavender Extreme
tf-lavender-extreme.description: An intensified lavender pushed toward the aromatic extreme — fuller and denser than a typical fougère, with a warm amber finish.

tf-lost-cherry.name: Lost Cherry
tf-lost-cherry.description: A lush, boozy cherry with dark almond and warm benzoin — opulent, addictive, and unapologetically hedonistic.

tf-neroli-portofino.name: Neroli Portofino
tf-neroli-portofino.description: A sun-drenched Italian Riviera citrus — clean, airy, and instantly transporting, best worn in warm light.

tf-noir-de-noir.name: Noir de Noir
tf-noir-de-noir.description: An opulent nocturnal rose layered over black truffle and oud — dark, sensual, and ceremonialy rich.

tf-noir-extreme.name: Noir Extreme
tf-noir-extreme.description: A warm, honeyed oriental with creamy sandalwood and nutmeg — richer and more opulent than the standard Noir.

tf-ombre-leather.name: Ombré Leather
tf-ombre-leather.description: A stark, metallic leather with cool jasmine and cardamom — austere and modern, less animalic than Tuscan Leather.

tf-oud-wood.name: Oud Wood
tf-oud-wood.description: A refined, smoky oud balanced with rosewood and cardamom — more wearable than most ouds, quietly luxurious.

tf-rose-prick.name: Rose Prick
tf-rose-prick.description: A defiant modern rose — thorny and green, brightened by berry and given attitude by earthy patchouli.

tf-santal-blush.name: Santal Blush
tf-santal-blush.description: A soft, creamy sandalwood kissed with warm cinnamon and rose — smooth, understated, and skin-close.

tf-sole-di-positano.name: Sole di Positano
tf-sole-di-positano.description: A bright Amalfi coast citrus lifted with tiare and jasmine over a tropical coconut base — effortless summer radiance.

tf-soleil-blanc.name: Soleil Blanc
tf-soleil-blanc.description: A luminous, creamy solar scent with tiare and ylang over coconut sandalwood — sunlit, warm, and deeply seductive.

tf-tobacco-oud.name: Tobacco Oud
tf-tobacco-oud.description: A powerful marriage of raw tobacco and dark oud over rose and leather — dense, commanding, and built for cold evenings.

tf-tobacco-vanille.name: Tobacco Vanille
tf-tobacco-vanille.description: A richly indulgent tobacco wrapped in vanilla and cacao — opulent, warm, and unapologetically sweet.

tf-tuscan-leather.name: Tuscan Leather
tf-tuscan-leather.description: A bold animalic leather sharpened by raspberry and saffron — assertive, polarizing, and unmistakably confident.

tf-velvet-orchid.name: Velvet Orchid
tf-velvet-orchid.description: A plush, after-dark orchid with rum and honey over velvety suede — sumptuous and seductive.

tf-white-suede.name: White Suede
tf-white-suede.description: A powdery, delicate suede with a clean white floral heart — soft, clean, and quietly feminine.

the-noir-29.name: Thé Noir 29
the-noir-29.description: Dark tea and fig layered over tobacco and woods, moody and slightly sweet.

tierra-del-fuego.name: Tierra del Fuego
tierra-del-fuego.description: A smoky amber with sharp pink pepper and cypress, evoking windswept southern forests and distant fires.

timbuktu.name: Timbuktu
timbuktu.description: A masterful, dry, earthy blend of green mango, vetiver, and sheer incense inspired by West African perfumery traditions.
timbuktu.story: "Inspired by 'Wusulan', a tradition where Malian women perfume their hair and skin with roots and magical resins."

tonka-25.name: Tonka 25
tonka-25.description: Soft tonka and vanilla wrapped in amber warmth, cozy and slightly powdery.

tulipe-xinu.name: Tulipe
tulipe-xinu.description: A delicate floral that captures the papery quality of a tulip petal — cool, slightly spicy, and architecturally precise.

vetiver-46.name: Vetiver 46
vetiver-46.description: Dark, smoky vetiver with incense and woods, powerful and brooding.

vetyverio-byredo.name: Vetyverio
vetyverio-byredo.description: Sparkling grapefruit cut by black pepper opens into a cool, earthy vetiver — linear, unisex, and all-season.

vetyverio-diptyque.name: Vetyverio
vetyverio-diptyque.description: A clean, slightly smoky vetiver with pepper and sage — dry and structural, works in any season.

volutes.name: Volutes
volutes.description: A warm tobacco-and-vanilla oriental with elegant iris — smoky and sweet in equal measure, sophisticated and unhurried.

wonderwood.name: Wonderwood
wonderwood.description: An overdose of woods. A synthetic, minimalist explosion of cedar and sandalwood with a dry, peppery incense opening.

yapay.name: Yapay
yapay.description: A clean, spare green tea with delicate violet and dry cedar — contemplative and quiet, perfect for focused mornings.

ylang-49.name: Ylang 49
ylang-49.description: A clean ylang-ylang that avoids banana-tropical clichés — reads as white floral and elegant, supported by warm sandalwood.
